message:
feat: add fcp-kernel crate and google-admin-reports connector manifest

fcp-kernel (new crate):
- Canonical owner of the invoke lifecycle, connector traits, and
  deployment state machines as part of the FCP3 mesh-first architecture
  migration (see docs/FCP3_Canonical_Owner_Map.md).
- Initial skeleton with fcp-core and serde dependencies, Apache-2.0
  license, publish=false. This crate will absorb invoke-path logic
  currently spread across fcp-host and fcp-core as the semantic
  ownership migration progresses.

connectors/google-admin-reports/manifest.toml (new):
- Connector manifest for Google Workspace Admin Reports API, declaring
  capabilities, operations, and configuration schema for FCP2 discovery.

Cargo.toml:
- Add fcp-kernel to workspace members list.

Cargo.lock:
- Updated to include fcp-kernel dependency resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,249 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:pending"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.google-admin-reports"
+name = "Google Admin Reports Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for Google Workspace Admin SDK Reports API (audit logs, usage reports)"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "init"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = ["z:public"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "network.listen"]
+
+# ── Operations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities"]
+description = "List admin audit activity events"
+capability = "admin.reports.audit.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".input_schema]
+required = ["application_name"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".input_schema.properties.application_name]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".input_schema.properties.user_key]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".input_schema.properties.start_time]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".input_schema.properties.end_time]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".output_schema]
+required = ["items"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".output_schema.properties.items]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["admin.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_activities".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List audit activity events for a Google Workspace application (admin, drive, login, etc.)."
+common_mistakes = ["application_name must be one of: admin, calendar, drive, groups, login, token, etc."]
+examples = ['{"application_name": "login", "user_key": "all"}']
+related = ["admin.list_user_usage"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage"]
+description = "List per-user usage reports"
+capability = "admin.reports.usage.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".input_schema]
+required = ["date"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".input_schema.properties.date]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".input_schema.properties.user_key]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".input_schema.properties.parameters]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".output_schema]
+required = ["usage_reports"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".output_schema.properties.usage_reports]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["admin.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_user_usage".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get per-user usage statistics for a given date."
+common_mistakes = ["Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format and cannot be today — data is available after a 24-48h delay"]
+examples = ['{"date": "2026-03-25", "user_key": "all"}']
+related = ["admin.list_customer_usage"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage"]
+description = "List customer-level usage reports"
+capability = "admin.reports.usage.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".input_schema]
+required = ["date"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".input_schema.properties.date]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".input_schema.properties.parameters]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".output_schema]
+required = ["usage_reports"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".output_schema.properties.usage_reports]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["admin.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_customer_usage".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get aggregate customer-level usage statistics for a given date."
+common_mistakes = ["Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format and cannot be today"]
+examples = ['{"date": "2026-03-25"}']
+related = ["admin.list_user_usage"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage"]
+description = "List entity-level usage reports"
+capability = "admin.reports.usage.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".input_schema]
+required = ["entity_type", "date"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".input_schema.properties.entity_type]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".input_schema.properties.date]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".input_schema.properties.entity_key]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".input_schema.properties.parameters]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".output_schema]
+required = ["usage_reports"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".output_schema.properties.usage_reports]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["admin.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."admin.list_entity_usage".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get entity-level (e.g., per-app, per-device) usage statistics."
+common_mistakes = ["entity_type must be one of 'gplus_communities' or similar entity types"]
+examples = ['{"entity_type": "gplus_communities", "date": "2026-03-25"}']
+related = ["admin.list_user_usage", "admin.list_customer_usage"]
+
+# ── Sandbox ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 256
+cpu_percent = 50
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 120000
+fs_readonly_paths = ["/usr", "/lib"]
+fs_writable_paths = ["$CONNECTOR_STATE"]
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+# ── Rate Limits ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "admin.reports.read"
+requests = 100
+window_ms = 1000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
+[rate_limits.operation_pools]
+"admin.list_activities" = ["admin.reports.read"]
+"admin.list_user_usage" = ["admin.reports.read"]
+"admin.list_customer_usage" = ["admin.reports.read"]
+"admin.list_entity_usage" = ["admin.reports.read"]

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-kernel"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "FCP execution kernel — canonical owner of invoke lifecycle, connector traits, and deployment state machines"
+license = "Apache-2.0"
+publish = false
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,135 @@
+//! # FCP Kernel
+//!
+//! Canonical owner of execution lifecycle semantics for the Flywheel Connector
+//! Protocol. This crate defines the types, traits, and state machines that govern
+//! how connectors are invoked, sessions managed, operations executed, and deployment
+//! lifecycle controlled.
+//!
+//! ## Semantic Domains Owned
+//!
+//! - **Invocation protocol**: `InvokeRequest`, `InvokeResponse`, `InvokeStatus`,
+//!   `SimulateRequest`, `SimulateResponse`
+//! - **Session establishment**: `HandshakeRequest`, `HandshakeResponse`, `SessionId`
+//! - **Connector traits**: `FcpConnector`, `RequestResponse`, `Streaming`,
+//!   `Bidirectional`, `Polling`, `Webhook`
+//! - **Lifecycle state machine**: `LifecycleState`, `LifecycleManager`,
+//!   `LifecycleTransition`
+//! - **Operation metadata**: `OperationInfo`, `Introspection`, `AgentHint`
+//! - **Execution control**: `CancelReason`, `CleanupBehavior`, `ProgressUpdate`
+//!
+//! ## Migration Note
+//!
+//! This crate currently re-exports types from `fcp-core`. As the FCP3 migration
+//! progresses, type definitions will move here and `fcp-core` will re-export from
+//! this crate instead. Consumers should target `fcp_kernel::` imports for new code.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+// ── Invocation Protocol ──────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{
+    InvokeContext, InvokeRequest, InvokeResponse, InvokeStatus, InvokeValidationError,
+    RequestId, ResponseMetadata,
+};
+
+// ── Handshake / Session ──────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{
+    AuthCaps, EventCaps, HandshakeRequest, HandshakeResponse, HostInfo, SessionId, TransportCaps,
+};
+
+// ── Simulate ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{SimulateRequest, SimulateResponse};
+
+// ── Subscription / Events ────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{EventAck, EventData, EventEnvelope, EventNack};
+
+// ── Connector Traits ─────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{
+    BaseConnector, Bidirectional, ConnectorMetrics, FcpConnector, Polling, RequestResponse,
+    Streaming, Webhook,
+};
+
+// ── Introspection / Operation Metadata ───────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{
+    AgentHint, ApprovalMode, EventInfo, Introspection, OperationInfo, ResourceTypeInfo,
+};
+
+// ── Lifecycle State Machine ──────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{
+    CanaryPolicy, CrashLoopDetector, HealthMetrics, LifecycleError, LifecycleManager,
+    LifecycleRecord, LifecycleState, LifecycleStatus, LifecycleTransition, TransitionReason,
+};
+
+// ── Health / Self-Check ──────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{HealthSnapshot, HealthState, SelfCheckReport, SelfCheckStatus};
+
+// ── Identity Types (re-exported for convenience) ─────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{ConnectorId, InstanceId, OperationId};
+
+// ── Error Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{FcpError, FcpResult};
+
+// ── Execution Control (PENDING-CARVE: definitions will move here) ─
+
+// These types are currently defined in fcp-host but should be platform-canonical.
+// They will be defined here and re-exported by fcp-host in a future phase.
+//
+// - CancelReason (from fcp-host::cancellation)
+// - CleanupBehavior (from fcp-host::cancellation)
+// - ProgressUpdate (from fcp-host::progress)
+// - RolloutDecision (from fcp-host::rollout)
+// - RolloutEvidence (from fcp-host::rollout)
+// - RolloutObservation (from fcp-host::rollout)
+
+// ── Cost & Usage ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{CostEstimate, ResourceAvailability, UsageMetric, UsageMetricKind};
+
+// ── Idempotency & Durability ─────────────────────────────────────
+
+pub use fcp_core::{IdempotencyClass, IdempotencyEntry, OperationIntent, OperationReceipt};
+
+#[cfg(test)]
+mod tests {
+    use super::*;
+
+    #[test]
+    fn kernel_exports_invoke_types() {
+        // Verify core invocation types are accessible
+        let _: InvokeStatus = InvokeStatus::Ok;
+        let _: ApprovalMode = ApprovalMode::Interactive;
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn kernel_exports_lifecycle_types() {
+        // Verify lifecycle state machine types are accessible
+        let _: LifecycleState = LifecycleState::Pending;
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn kernel_exports_health_types() {
+        let _: HealthState = HealthState::Ready;
+        let _: SelfCheckStatus = SelfCheckStatus::Ok;
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn kernel_exports_connector_id() {
+        let id = ConnectorId::from_static("fcp.test");
+        assert_eq!(id.as_str(), "fcp.test");
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn kernel_exports_operation_id() {
+        let id = OperationId::from_static("test.op");
+        assert_eq!(id.as_str(), "test.op");
+    }
+}
